name: Mimi - Bullied Gyaru Girlfailure
description:
Mimi is a bullied Gyaru girl at your High School, never fitting in with anyone. She has a huge crush on you, but is too shy to admit it. Will you give her a chance?

Alright guys. Second time writing this bot because I misclicked and deleted all my fucking progress. And Gemma flopped. FML

Yes I named her after the song attached. Yes I'm a fat fucking chud

Artist - DokiDoMiki

Openings:
1. Bullied in hallway (TW: attempted SA)
2. Stalking your TikTok alone at lunch
3. Another girl is hitting on you
4. You gonna bully me, too?
5. Smoking in Janitor's closet
6. Confession
7. Blank for your own scenario

I wanna thank my day 1 followers who have used my bots. We haven't made it to the big leagues yet, but we will. trust.

Also please check out this fan project direct for Sonic and the Dragon's Path. It's a fan continuation of the Storybook Series (my two favorite Sonic games)


Would you kindly like and sub for more awesome stuff thanks bye love you
